task_updates.executor_notes: Added `ORCHESTRATOR_CAPACITY_RECONCILER_MODE=off|shadow|authoritative` parsing in `gpu_orchestrator/config.py`, defaulting to `off`, with startup/config logging and validation for unknown values. Integrated `CapacityReconciler` and `CapacityActionExecutor` into `gpu_orchestrator/control_loop.py`. In `off` mode the legacy phase order is preserved. In `shadow` and `authoritative` modes the loop now runs lifecycle probing, promotion, health checks, error cleanup, orphan reconciliation, and route-stale draining before invoking the reconciler, so shadow observation happens after lifecycle work and before legacy capacity mutations. Shadow mode then refreshes its own legacy snapshot and continues through `_handle_early_termination`, `_calculate_scaling_decision`, and `_execute_scaling` as the authoritative legacy path. Authoritative mode runs the reconciler and folds counters into `CycleSummary`, then skips only the legacy capacity actions while still running periodic zombie/storage cleanup. Added `tests/gpu_orchestrator/test_control_loop_capacity_reconciler_mode.py` for shadow ordering, authoritative skip behavior, and `off` rollback ordering; extended config tests for mode defaults, parsing, and validation. Verification passed for the new control-loop/config tests, full `tests/gpu_orchestrator/control`, scaling/route-stale/route-aware targeted tests, database/migration helper tests, and py_compile. Full suite was run and failed only at the already observed missing `scripts.spot_instance_lifetime_test` import, unrelated to T7.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. Shadow and authoritative modes run lifecycle probing/promotion, active health checks, error cleanup, orphan reconciliation, and route-stale draining before the reconciler. Shadow mode invokes the reconciler before refreshing a legacy snapshot and running `_handle_early_termination`, `_calculate_scaling_decision`, and `_execute_scaling`. Authoritative mode invokes the reconciler, folds counters into `CycleSummary`, skips those three legacy capacity actions, and still runs periodic zombie/storage cleanup. `off` mode preserves the legacy ordering for rollback.
